title: papaya manihot
intro: Papaya manihot, also known as Manihot esculenta, is a plant species native to South America and is a type of starchy root crop commonly known as cassava or yuca. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of papaya manihot include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving digestive health. Herbal preparations of papaya manihot often involve boiling or roasting the root, which is then used to make teas, soups, or powders for medicinal purposes.
